must_detect.matched_text: Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — Al-Nour Industrial Holdings (CR 2028990001) regarding potential acquisition of Al-Rimal Packaging Co. (CR 1017783452) and related disclosure under KMA Continuing Obligations.
